# EdProSys

> EdProSys is an AI-first school operating system for Indian K-12 schools. It automates a WhatsApp parent-communication bot, AI-generated report cards, teacher evaluation, and automated principal briefings, replacing fragmented spreadsheets and manual processes with one platform covering attendance, fees, exams, timetables, admissions, and payroll.

EdProSys is built by Pranix AI Labs Private Limited, based in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India. Also known as School-OS.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://www.edprosys.com/): Product overview for school administrators.
- Portals: dedicated dashboards for teachers, students, parents, and school admins (role-based, phone+PIN or credential login).

## Key capabilities

- WhatsApp parent bot for attendance, fee reminders, and announcements.
- AI-generated report cards and teacher evaluation.
- Automated principal briefings summarizing school-wide activity.
- Multi-tenant: supports multiple schools, each with isolated data (RLS-enforced).
- Multilingual UI (English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam).

## For AI agents / developers

- Also reachable at schoolos.in.
- Integrates with VidyaGrid/EdGridAI (adaptive learning) via a single-sign-on launch flow for enrolled students.
